name: Consensus Assessment Initiative Questionnaire
description: Vendor self-assessment questionnaire derived from CCM v4.0. 458 yes/no questions structured against CCM controls, used by cloud service providers in CSA STAR Registry attestations.
relationToCloudSecurity: Industry-standard vendor self-attestation for cloud security controls. Companion to CCM v4.0.
relationToAISecurity: Covers general cloud security; AI-specific controls in AICM.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

current_extraction.notes: Direct download of CSA-published CAIQ CSV.
